heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 857–18 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated for purposes of carrying out sections 857–13 to 857–18 of this title not to exceed $520,000 for the fiscal year ending , $572,000 for the fiscal year ending , $565,000 for the fiscal year ending , $600,000 for the fiscal year ending , and $555,000 for the fiscal year ending . Such sums as may be appropriated under this section shall remain available until expended.September 30, 1978September 30, 1979September 30, 1980September 30, 1981September 30, 1982
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those contained in this section, which authorized appropriations, beginning with an authorization of $200,000 for the fiscal year ending , for the operation of the National Advisory Committee on Oceans and Atmosphere as originally established on , were contained in prior to repeal by .June 30, 1972Aug. 16, 1971section 857–12 of this titlesection 7(a) of Pub.
